title: Create JSON Output for Employee Directory
scenario: Write a JSON output for an employee directory. The output should contain the employee name, title, department, and contact information. The input will be a list of dictionaries containing employee information.
constraints: Must be a single JSON object
Must include the required employee information fields

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the JSON output is syntactically valid.
Check if the JSON output accurately represents the input data.
Check if the JSON output correctly defines the fields for the employee information.
